restaurants.name: Amato's Pizza & Pasta
restaurants.description: A popular pizza and pasta spot in Madison serving classic Italian-American pies and hearty pasta dishes.

restaurants.name: Ashley's Ice Cream
restaurants.description: A must-stop after a day at Hammonasset or Madison's town beaches, scooping premium ice cream and frozen treats.

restaurants.name: Bar Bouchee
restaurants.description: A French bistro on Wall Street with a devoted following for its steak frites and prix fixe dinners. One of Madison's most distinctive dining experiences.

restaurants.name: Bradley & Wall
restaurants.description: Elevated American cuisine in Madison's town center, offering a refined menu in a stylish setting near the Wall Street shopping district.

restaurants.name: Brother Mike's
restaurants.description: A casual American restaurant in Madison serving comfort food favorites and a laid-back atmosphere.

restaurants.name: Cafe Allegre
restaurants.description: Refined Italian dining in a cozy setting, known as one of Madison's premier spots for classic Italian cuisine with an elegant touch.

restaurants.name: Circle Pizza
restaurants.description: A neighborhood pizza shop serving classic pies and Italian favorites to Madison's North Madison area.

restaurants.name: Clam Castle
restaurants.description: A Madison institution on the Boston Post Road, serving whole belly clams, lobster rolls, and fried seafood from a classic roadside stand since the 1960s.

restaurants.name: Cohen's Bagel Company
restaurants.description: Fresh bagels and breakfast sandwiches near the shore, a go-to morning spot for Madison locals looking for a quick and satisfying start to the day.

restaurants.name: Comomango
restaurants.description: Mexican fare in Madison's town center, bringing south-of-the-border flavors to the Connecticut shoreline.

restaurants.name: Cristy's Madison
restaurants.description: A pub-style American restaurant that stays busy year-round, offering casual dining and a comfortable neighborhood vibe.

restaurants.name: Donahue's Madison Beach Grille
restaurants.description: Upscale coastal dining with refined seafood and waterfront views near Madison Beach, a top choice for a special night out on the shoreline.

restaurants.name: Dunkin'
restaurants.description: A quick-service coffee and breakfast chain location in Madison, convenient for grab-and-go donuts, iced coffee, and breakfast sandwiches.

restaurants.name: Friends & Company
restaurants.description: A popular gathering spot for casual meals and drinks, offering American pub fare in a welcoming social atmosphere.

restaurants.name: Grand Apizza
restaurants.description: A solid pizza option in Madison's town center, serving New Haven-style apizza and Italian favorites.

restaurants.name: Great Wall
restaurants.description: Chinese restaurant in North Madison offering a full menu of traditional Chinese-American dishes and takeout.

restaurants.name: Hometown Bakery
restaurants.description: A local bakery in Madison turning out fresh-baked goods, pastries, and sweet treats for the community.

restaurants.name: Iron Chef Sushi
restaurants.description: Japanese cuisine in the heart of Madison, serving sushi rolls, sashimi, and other Japanese specialties.

restaurants.name: James Madison House
restaurants.description: An American pub and dining spot in North Madison offering hearty pub-style fare in a historic setting.

restaurants.name: Jersey Mike's
restaurants.description: A sub sandwich franchise in Madison serving made-to-order subs with fresh-sliced meats and cheeses.

restaurants.name: Jia Mei Asian Kitchen
restaurants.description: Chinese and Asian fusion cuisine in Madison's town center, offering a diverse menu of Asian dishes and flavors.

restaurants.name: Lenny & Joe's Fish Tale
restaurants.description: A shoreline favorite drawing crowds for seafood platters, lobster rolls, and its iconic carousel. A quintessential Connecticut seafood experience near Madison Beach.

restaurants.name: Life Bowls
restaurants.description: Acai and smoothie bowls for health-conscious diners, bringing fresh and colorful superfood bowls to Madison's town center.

restaurants.name: Madison Beach Hotel
restaurants.description: Waterfront fine dining steps from the sand, serving coastal cuisine with ocean views at one of the Connecticut shoreline's most scenic hotel restaurants.

restaurants.name: McDonald's
restaurants.description: A fast food chain location in Madison along the Boston Post Road, offering the standard menu of burgers, fries, and breakfast items.

restaurants.name: Meriano's Bakery & Cannoli Truck
restaurants.description: A mobile and local bakery specializing in fresh cannoli and Italian pastries, bringing authentic Italian-American baked goods to the Madison area.

restaurants.name: Nick's Place
restaurants.description: A longstanding breakfast and lunch spot on the Post Road, cherished by locals for its no-frills morning meals and friendly service.

restaurants.name: Old Schoolhouse Deli
restaurants.description: A neighborhood deli in Madison serving sandwiches, subs, and deli classics in a casual counter-service setting.

restaurants.name: Petrillo's Pizza Pub & Grill
restaurants.description: Pizza pub and grill offering pies, pub fare, and a relaxed dining atmosphere in a neighborhood-friendly setting.

restaurants.name: Pho Madison
restaurants.description: Vietnamese pho and noodle dishes on the shoreline, bringing steaming bowls of authentic Vietnamese soup to the Madison dining scene.

restaurants.name: Pizza Works Too
restaurants.description: A pizza shop near the shore in Madison, serving classic pies and Italian-American staples.

restaurants.name: Portofino Pizza
restaurants.description: A neighborhood pizzeria in North Madison offering traditional pizza pies and Italian favorites.

restaurants.name: Red Tomato Pizzeria
restaurants.description: A popular pizzeria serving classic pies and Italian dishes, a reliable choice for pizza night in Madison.

restaurants.name: RJ Cafe & Bistro
restaurants.description: A local favorite for breakfast and lunch, offering cafe fare and bistro-style dishes in a welcoming atmosphere.

restaurants.name: S&B Cafe
restaurants.description: A cozy cafe in Madison offering a warm atmosphere, coffee, and light fare for a relaxed morning or afternoon break.

restaurants.name: Starbucks
restaurants.description: A coffee chain location in Madison's town center, offering the full Starbucks menu of espresso drinks, teas, and snacks.

restaurants.name: Steamed
restaurants.description: A modern approach to seafood in a casual setting, specializing in steamed and prepared seafood dishes in the heart of Madison.

restaurants.name: Taco Pacifico
restaurants.description: A seasonal Mexican eatery at the Clam Castle location, serving tacos and Mexican-inspired dishes during the warmer months.

restaurants.name: What's Cookin
restaurants.description: A family favorite for hearty morning meals, serving classic American breakfast and lunch in a welcoming, homestyle setting.
